name: The Lygon Arms
description: A historic 16th-century coaching inn on Broadway's High Street, offering traditional ales, hearty meals, and comfortable rooms. A favourite stop for Cotswold Way walkers.
offer: 10% off bar meals for trail walkers — show this page

name: Cotswold Outdoors Broadway
description: Everything you need for the trail — from replacement socks to waterproofs. Knowledgeable staff who know the Cotswold Way inside out.
offer: Free blister kit with any purchase over £20

name: Cleeve Hill Golf Club Café
description: Warm up with a hot drink and hearty food at the highest point of the Cotswolds. Walkers welcome — muddy boots and all.
offer: Soup & roll for £5 — trail walker special

name: The Painswick Hotel
description: A boutique hotel in the heart of Painswick with a relaxing spa — the perfect reward after a long day on the trail.
offer: Trail walker spa package — 30 minutes for £25

name: Thermae Bath Spa
description: Britain's only natural thermal spa. After 102 miles on the trail, soak your tired muscles in the rooftop pool with views over Bath.
offer: 15% off 2-hour Thermae Welcome session — you earned it!
